messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: mono-rotate pack: one resident agent rotates through the whole pipeline (all gates preserved) - FES's new default bring-up
What it solves: A new pack `mono-rotate`: ONE resident pipeline agent walks each parcel through every role in turn
(assume a role, do the work + its gate, self-hand-off, re-prompt into the next role: coder -> cleaner ->
architect -> hardener -> documenter -> QA, plus the specifier stage as the intake boundary allo…
How it works: The mono-rotate pack brings up one resident pipeline agent covering all roles, coordinator auto-provisioned separately
